mode_rationale: Per the phase guard (phase=LIVE, simulation=false, start_date set) this run is nominally LIVE. However NO lead source is provisioned and NO Google Sheets connector is reachable in this scheduled session, so live polling is physically impossible. No leads were read, recorded, or escalated. Producing a readiness report is the correct output.
note_on_run_time: Cron drift unchanged for the ninth consecutive LEAD_CHECK run. Job fires ~08:03 PHT (00:03 UTC) instead of the documented 13:00 PHT slot. Observed 2026-05-27, 28, 30, 31, 06-01, 06-02, 06-03, 06-04, 06-05. Recommendation unchanged: align the scheduled-tasks cron with the documented PHT slot, or rewrite the agent prompt to reflect the actual fire time.

CRITICAL_FLAG_unconfirmed_state_flip.recommendation: Confirm the LIVE flip is intentional and human-authorized. If it was not, revert campaign_state.json to PRE_LAUNCH / simulation=true until lead sources are provisioned. Do not rely on lead capture until at least one source below is live.

google_sheets.note: No Google Sheets / Drive MCP connector is present in this session's tool inventory (Gmail MCP exists, but not Sheets/Drive). No lead-capture sheet has been created or registered. lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet remains null on all three fields. There is nothing to poll. Required before LIVE polling can work: create the sheet using expected_lead_schema as the header row, register sheet_id + tab_name in lead_check_state.json, set header_row_validated=true, and authorize a Sheets/Drive MCP for unattended scheduled access.

wati.note: campaign_state.json platforms.wati.status='not_setup'. No account, no Client ID, no registered sales-agent WA number. Consequence: inbound WhatsApp lead ingestion is unavailable AND outbound HOT-lead escalation to the sales agent CANNOT be automated. If a HOT lead arrived today it could not be alerted through WATI.

hubspot.note: campaign_state.json platforms.hubspot.status='not_setup'. No CRM destination, no deal pipeline, no owner routing. Captured leads would have no persistent record beyond _completed/{date}/lead_updates.json.

brevo.note: campaign_state.json platforms.brevo.status reads 'active' (templates=10, lists=5, drip_sequence=true). No Brevo MCP is reachable in this session to verify, and LEAD_CHECK does not itself write to Brevo. Flagged as unverified: confirm the Brevo account, lists, and drip sequence actually exist before treating the lead -> email-nurture path as functional.

meta_lead_ads.note: Meta Ads MCP is reachable. Two campaigns (IL-1, PH-1) are marked ACTIVE, but the ad account carries account_issue 'UNSETTLED - billing balance must be paid before ads deliver', so delivery (and therefore lead generation) is itself in question. No Meta Lead Ads forms exist and no lead-form-to-sheet/CRM bridge is configured.

field_constraints.country: ISO-3166 alpha-2 (IL, PH, US, etc.) preferred; free text accepted if country picker not deployed
field_constraints.phone: E.164 format; required for WATI HOT-lead alert routing

suggested_actions: 1. HUMAN: confirm whether the LIVE / simulation=false flip is intentional and authorized. If not, revert campaign_state.json to PRE_LAUNCH / simulation=true.

2. Create the lead-capture Google Sheet using expected_lead_schema as the header row. Record sheet_id and tab_name in _status/lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet and set header_row_validated=true.
3. Authorize a Google Sheets (or Drive) MCP for unattended scheduled-task access so the LEAD_CHECK slot can read the sheet without human re-auth.
4. Create the WATI account, obtain Client ID, register the sales agent's WA number, and add the WATI MCP to the scheduled-task inventory so HOT-lead escalation can be automated.
5. Stand up HubSpot (or equivalent CRM) with the 30-Day-Close pipeline stages, owner routing, and UTM-to-source mapping.
6. Verify the Brevo account, lists, and drip sequence actually exist (state file now claims active).
7. Pay the Meta ad-account balance to clear the UNSETTLED issue so the Meta capture channel can deliver.
8. Confirm Meta Pixel 1599211187973958 and Google Tag AW-18095957436 are installed and firing on the live site for lead-event attribution.
9. Reconcile IL fixed pricing to a single source of truth (CLAUDE.md: 1,535,000 / 1,650,000 ILS) before any lead-facing price quote.
10. Align the scheduled-tasks cron with the documented 13:00 PHT slot, or rewrite the agent prompt to match the actual ~08:03 PHT fire time.
11. Generate _queue/2026-06-05/ with explicit LEAD_CHECK tasks once at least one lead source is provisioned.
